sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89529" key="proskatano/hsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσκατα-νόησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n89529.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">perceiving besides</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0537.tlg006:p.29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.29</biblScope> </bibl> U.</sense> </entryFree>
